prestazioni: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger upgrade for the 1.4L T-Jet (engine code: 199A4.000) with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Forge Motorsport silicone turbo inlet hose and a 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system by Supersprint featuring a 76mm diameter, 400-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and flow

ECU remap via Alientech KESSv2 with a Stage 2+ custom tune targeting 220 HP and 320 Nm of torque, utilizing a 2.5-bar MAP sensor from AEM and a high-flow fuel pump by Walbro 450 LPH, alongside Bosch EV14 60lb/hr injectors for precise fuel delivery under boost

Custom front-mount intercooler (FMIC) kit by Bell Intercoolers with a 600x300x76mm core, paired with a Mishimoto silicone charge pipe kit and a 50mm blow-off valve by GFB Respons, ensuring consistent intake temperatures and eliminating heat soak during spirited driving
estetica: Rear diffuser by Maxton Design (Linea T-Jet specific) with integrated dual 80mm exhaust tips, finished in carbon fiber weave for a motorsport-inspired look, complemented by a Maxton Design front lip spoiler and side skirts in matching carbon fiber

OEM+ style LED headlight retrofit with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (H7 for low beam, H1 for high beam) and a custom Morimoto HID projector lens kit, paired with a set of 18" OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels in 8Jx18 ET35, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport 4S 215/40/18 tires for aggressive stance and grip

Full interior carbon fiber trim kit by Seibon, including dashboard inserts, door cards, and center console panels, paired with a custom Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel and Recaro Sportster CS seats in black leather with red stitching for a track-ready cockpit
